case_title: SMILOVITSKY, BORIS VS MOONEY, KRISTAL L.

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR SMILOVITSKY, BORIS ASSIGNED TO WITH, PETER DBA ACE JUDGMENT RECOVERY SERVICES
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF THE NOTICE AND APPLICATION FOR THE RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY THE ASSIGNEE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMILOVITSKY, BORIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOONEY, KRISTAL L. $5,021.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,041.00, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE #766647. JUDGMENT ENTERED ON AUGUST 18, 1997. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO DEFENDANT KRISTAL L. MOONEY- NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD.
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 766647 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMILOVITSKY, BORIS AS TO DEFENDANT MOONEY, KRISTAL L.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $4,949.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MOONEY, KRISTAL L.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED.
